profile.name: Vasudev S
profile.title: AI & ML Engineer
profile.tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of AI, ML, and software engineering.

now.text: Currently developing intelligent AI applications, including vision-based inspection systems, legal document analysis using transformer models, and interactive full-stack web applications using Next.js, Python, and modern AI frameworks.

about.bio: Final-year B.E. student in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning at BMS Institute of Technology and Management, with a Diploma in Mechanical Engineering. Passionate about developing AI-powered solutions, computer vision applications, and full-stack web applications. Experienced in building real-world projects using Python, Deep Learning, YOLO, Next.js, and modern web technologies.
about.careerObjective: Aspiring AI & Machine Learning Engineer seeking opportunities to apply my technical skills to real-world challenges while continuously learning and contributing to innovative software and AI solutions.

projects.title: An RFID-Integrated Smart Helmet System for Real-Time Traffic Monitoring and Rider Safety.
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered traffic monitoring system that detects helmet usage, recognizes vehicle number plates using OCR, and verifies helmet authenticity through RFID integration. The system automates traffic violation detection and improves road safety.

projects.title: Musical Database Management System
projects.description: Developed a web-based musical database system that allows users to search songs and retrieve musical information such as BPM, scale, genre, and other metadata using a structured database.

projects.title: AI Voice Personal Assistant
projects.description: Designed and developed an AI-powered voice assistant capable of understanding voice commands, responding intelligently, and assisting users with everyday tasks using speech recognition and natural language processing.

projects.title: Automated Manufacturing Defect Detection System Using Vision-Based Deep Learning
projects.description: Developed a computer vision system using YOLOv11 and deep learning techniques to automatically detect manufacturing defects in real time, improving quality inspection and reducing manual intervention.

projects.title: Automated Legal Document Analysis and Case Outcome Prediction Using Transformer Models
projects.description: Developed an intelligent legal document analysis system that extracts information from legal documents using OCR and predicts potential case outcomes using transformer-based natural language processing models.

experience.description: Worked on AI/ML solutions leveraging Python, TensorFlow, and computer vision.

education.institution: BMS Institute of Technology and Management (BMSIT&M)

certificates.title: Introduction to Industry 4.0 and Industrial Internet of Things

achievements.title: IEEE Conference Paper Presentation
achievements.description: Presented a research paper on Music Information Retrieval and Database Systems at an IEEE conference, demonstrating research and technical presentation skills.

achievements.title: First Prize – Automatic Magnetic Braking System Using ABS
achievements.description: Received First Prize at the college Open Day Project Exhibition for developing an Automatic Magnetic Braking System integrated with the Anti-lock Braking System (ABS). The project focused on improving vehicle safety through innovative braking technology and practical engineering design.

achievements.title: CODE RED 3.0 – National Level 24-Hour Hackathon
achievements.description: Participated in Round 1 of the National Level 24-Hour Hackathon 'CODE RED 3.0' organized by the E-Cell, BMS Institute of Technology & Management. Collaborated on solving real-world challenges under time constraints, strengthening problem-solving, teamwork, and software development skills.

achievements.title: AI-Based Manufacturing Defect Detection
achievements.description: Designed and developed a computer vision system using YOLOv11 for automated manufacturing defect detection with real-time object detection.

achievements.title: Smart Helmet Detection System
achievements.description: Developed an AI-powered traffic monitoring system with helmet detection, number plate recognition, OCR, and RFID-based verification.

achievements.title: Full Stack Portfolio Development
achievements.description: Built a professional portfolio website using Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and an admin dashboard.

achievements.title: NPTEL Certifications
achievements.description: Successfully completed multiple NPTEL certification courses in Internet of Things, Industry 4.0, and Leadership & Team Effectiveness.
